news.summary: The Digital Assets and Consumer Protection Act introduced by Mark Walker aims to combat the increasing issue of cryptocurrency fraud. This proposed legislation is targeting to protect consumers and investors in the digital asset space, where reported cases of fraud have been on the rise. Walker's bill seeks to implement measures to ensure the security and integrity of digital transactions, especially as the market continues to expand rapidly. This act comes in response to the escalating number of fraudulent activities in the crypto sector, highlighting the necessity for regulatory safeguards to safeguard individuals engaging in digital asset transactions.
news.headline: Illinois Senator's bill targets to recover $163M lost to crypto fraud with Digital Assets and Consumer Protection Act.

The report delves into the company's financial performance in the second quarter of the fiscal year ending March 2025, as well as its projected full-year earnings for the same fiscal year. Noteworthy points from the report include a substantial 28% year-on-year growth in sales during the cumulative second quarter of the fiscal year ending March 2025.

news.summary: A recent executive order issued by President Trump mandates that all government agencies must transition to electronic payments for tax refunds, Social Security, and various benefits by September 30. This move signifies a shift towards modernization and efficiency, impacting a vast number of individuals relying on these payments for financial support.
news.headline: Trump's order mandates gov't agencies to switch to electronic payments for tax refunds, Social Security by Sept 30.

news.summary: The 1-4 Cavalry Reunion 2025 is excited to announce its forthcoming gathering on July 25-27, 2025, at the Lexington Marriott City Center in Lexington, Kentucky. This reunion, designated #14cavreunion2025, aims to bring together veterans of Operation Iraqi Freedom 2007-2009 for a time of reminiscing, camaraderie, and reflection on the strong connections forged during their military service. The event is actively looking for corporate sponsors to participate in supporting this special occasion.
news.headline: 1-4 Cavalry Reunion 2025 set to reunite Iraqi Surge veterans in Lexington, KY on July 25-27, 2025. Seeking corporate sponsors.

news.summary: Stablecoins have been in the spotlight with various developments globally. In the US, the Stablecoin Transparency and Accountability for a Better Ledger Economy Act has passed a critical vote, aiming to regulate stablecoins in payments and tied to the US dollar, facing pushback from some lawmakers. In Europe, stricter regulations have led to exchanges delisting non-compliant stablecoins. First Digital's stablecoin briefly depegged over reserve concerns, while Trump's World Liberty Financial launched a USD-backed stablecoin facing criticism. In Congress, Coinbase CEO's proposal to offer interest on stablecoin holdings has faced opposition. Binance halted trading of Tether's USDT in compliance with EU regulations. Additionally, stablecoins are seeing large capital inflows globally, considered safe havens amidst economic uncertainties. In Japan, firms are looking to launch stablecoins as the government softens its stance on cryptocurrencies. Overall, stablecoins are facing regulatory challenges while also gaining momentum in various markets.
news.headline: Stablecoins on the rise with new US laws and Japan's welcoming move. US bill seeks to regulate stablecoins, with $3.5M Trump-backed coin released. Europe imposes stricter rules. Capitol inflows signal growing trust, and Japan sees uptick in stablecoin launches. Ripple's legal future uncertain.

news.summary: The stablecoin supply surged by over $30 billion in the first quarter of 2025, reaching a new record high of $219 billion on March 15, despite a 19% drop in the overall crypto market capitalization. Investors are cautious amid US tariff fears, with stablecoins being used as a hedge while waiting for market stability. Industry experts predict the stablecoin supply may surpass $1 trillion in 2025, potentially boosting the crypto market. Ethereum saw over $3 trillion worth of stablecoin transactions in Q1, with daily active addresses using stablecoins on the mainnet surpassing 200,000 for the first time. Although the price of Ether fell by over 45% during the quarter, analysts attribute this to broader macroeconomic concerns and Ethereum-specific pressures. Despite the decline, analysts foresee a 70% chance for the crypto market to bottom by June 2025 as tariff negotiations progress.
news.headline: Stablecoin supply hits $30B surge in Q1 amid market caution over US tariffs. Ethereum sees $3T transactions; ETH falls 45%. Experts predict $1T stablecoin market in 2025.

news.headline: Linux Foundation and EBU to launch Media eXchange Layer Project for real-time media exchange. Innovating software-driven media production.

news.summary: CleanSpark, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSK), known as America's Bitcoin Miner®, has reported a significant increase in its production and holdings. Additionally, CleanSpark has achieved a mining rate of 42.4 exahash, reflecting a 4.2% increase compared to the previous month. The company currently holds 11,869 bitcoins in its treasury. This data was announced by CleanSpark, Inc. on April 4, 2025, through a press release.
news.headline: CleanSpark's March 2025 Bitcoin mining update: 700 bitcoins produced (+13% MoM), 42.4 exahash achieved (+4.2% MoM), 11,869 bitcoins in treasury.

news.summary: The global dental equipment market was worth US$6.5 billion in 2023 and is predicted to grow at a CAGR of 6.2%, reaching US$6.9 billion in 2024 and US$9.3 billion by 2029. The growth is driven by government initiatives improving dental health, with key advancements in technology such as dental lasers and digital imaging. Challenges include high costs of equipment and lack of reimbursement, along with a shortage of trained dental professionals worldwide. Major players include DENTSPLY SIRONA Inc., Planmeca Group, Envista Holdings Corporation, Align Technology Inc., and A-dec Inc. For details, visit https://www.marketsandmarkets.com/pdfdownloadNew.asp?id=784. DENTSPLY SIRONA Inc. and Planmeca Group are highlighted for their innovative solutions and technologies in the market.
news.headline: Global dental equipment market to hit US$9.3 billion by 2029, driven by specialized equipment, with growth attributed to advanced technologies and government programs. Challenges include high costs and lack of reimbursement, with opportunities in emerging markets. Key players include DENTSPLY SIRONA Inc., Planmeca Group, and Envista Holdings Corporation.

news.summary: Wall Street has been given a warning as the probability of a U.S. recession has risen to 60%, up 40% from last month, due to the recent tariff increases. JPMorgan analyst Maia G. Crook highlights that the latest round of tariff hikes could lead to the "largest U.S. tax hike in nearly 60 years," impacting household and business spending, sentiment, and disrupting global supply chains. The escalation of the tariff war with a 22% hike has heightened fears of retaliation and economic slowdowns. Crook cautions about the ripple effects and uncertainties surrounding trade policies that may exacerbate the situation.
news.headline: JPMorgan raises recession risk to 60% due to record tax hike, with tariff escalation sparking uncertainty.

Their offerings extend to an exceptional in-store atmosphere, a varied product range, and other features that resonate well with coffee aficionados.
news.headline: Juan Valdez expanding in US with 16 stores in Miami and Orlando by 2025, offering premium Colombian coffee and unique experiences.

news.summary: Strategy Inc. (formerly MicroStrategy) has shifted its focus to Bitcoin, holding 528,185 BTC valued at $35.63 billion. The company offers equity classes with double-digit yields linked to cryptocurrency risk, becoming a proxy for Bitcoin exposure. Recent purchases include $2 billion worth of BTC at around $86,969 per coin. The company's preferred shares offer fixed income returns but with risks tied to Bitcoin's performance. Strategy has spawned leveraged and inverse ETFs related to its equity movements, allowing investors to access turbocharged Bitcoin exposure. While this strategy offers opportunities for gaining exposure to Bitcoin, it also comes with risks such as dilution, volatility, and dependence on Bitcoin's market performance. As the company continues to integrate Bitcoin into its financial framework, the investment outcome will heavily depend on cryptocurrency market trends, financial management, and regulatory changes.
news.headline: Michael Saylor's firm, Strategy Inc., has transformed into a Bitcoin-centric entity, holding 528,185 BTC valued at approximately $37.6 billion, with YTD yield of 11.0%. Its innovative approach involves leveraging equity classes with double-digit yields linked to cryptocurrency risk, along with the creation of leveraged ETFs. The company's financial framework is now intricately tied to Bitcoin's price fluctuations, making it a high-beta Bitcoin play. Various market instruments trading around Strategy's ecosystem have shown different performances, indicating the effects of volatility and leverage in the Bitcoin-correlated financial system. Strategy's strategy of replacing diversification with correlation raises concerns about sustainability and investor trust. The introduction of leveraged and inverse products offers traders amplified exposure to Bitcoin through MSTR without directly holding the asset, presenting opportunities and risks in a rapidly evolving financial landscape.

news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, the MultiBank Group achieved notable recognition at Money Expo Mexico 2025 by securing two prestigious awards. The awards won were for ‘Best Client Funds Protection Broker’ and ‘Best Social Trading Solution.’ This accomplishment underscores the company's commitment to ensuring the safety and security of client funds, as well as its innovative approach to social trading. The accolades received at the event highlight MultiBank Group’s dedication to excellence in the financial industry.
news.headline: MultiBank Group receives awards for Best Client Funds Protection Broker and Best Social Trading Solution at Money Expo Mexico 2025.

news.summary: Despite the crumbling of Wall Street due to tariffs, the U.S. labor market remains strong and unaffected, easing concerns of economic weakness among investors. According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics, nonfarm payrolls saw a significant increase of 228,000 in March, surpassing the three-month average of 195,000 and exceeding economists' predictions of 135,000. The figures for February were revised downward to 117,000. Private sector payrolls also showed a substantial rise of 209,000, the highest since December 2024, with notable job growth in health care, social assistance, transportation and warehousing, and retail trade following the return of workers from a strike. Additionally, public sector payrolls unexpectedly increased by 19,000. This data reflects the ongoing strength of the U.S. labor market despite economic uncertainties linked to tariffs and other factors.
news.headline: Strong March jobs report with 228,000 nonfarm payrolls surpassing expectations, private sector payrolls surge by 209,000. Wall Street worries about tariffs.

The Beast.". This event is garnering attention for its innovative approach to giving back, pitting the 144K Collective against MrBeast in what promises to be a transformative initiative.

news.summary: The sale of the operational commercial-scale battery recycling facility in McCarran, Nevada will help fund the commercialization of more advanced technologies. This sale aims at supporting the expansion of innovative processes within the facility. The transaction is expected to facilitate the advancement of new technologies to scale up the operations and increase efficiency at the facility. This strategic move is crucial for further enhancing the capabilities of the facility in processing a larger volume of batteries and improving overall recycling rates. The proceeds from the sale will be directed towards implementing cutting-edge technologies at the facility to achieve this goal. This development signifies a significant step towards modernizing the battery recycling industry while addressing environmental concerns.
news.headline: American Battery Technology Company to sell property in Fernley, Nevada to support battery recycling facility in McCarran.

news.summary: Clothing company Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE:LEVI) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 7 after the market closes. Analysts predict earnings of 28 cents per share for the quarter, up from 26 cents a year prior. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.54 billion, a slight decrease from $1.56 billion in the previous year. Telsey Advisory Group analyst Dana Telsey reiterated an Outperform rating and a price target of $23 on Levi Strauss. The company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 3.60% and a quarterly dividend of 13 cents per share.
news.headline: Investors can earn $500/month from Levi Strauss stock with Q1 expectations of 28 cents EPS and $1.54 billion revenue.
